title: Penalty for contravention of regulations
content:
Regulations under this Ordinance may provide that a contravention 
Last updated date
1.5.2025
Employment Ordinance
Part XIV	
14-20
Section 74	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
thereof shall be an offence and may provide penalties therefor not 
exceeding a fine at level 6.
(Added 24 of 1988 s. 2. Amended 103 of 1995 s. 24)
